name: Smart Dock Menus
description: Adds app-aware quick-access menus to your dock icons. Right-click VS Code to jump into a recent project, right-click Files to open a recent file, right-click Spotify to see what's playing and control playback — all without opening the app first. Built on open standards (MPRIS, XDG recent files, VS Code's own history). Works with Dash-to-Dock and Ubuntu Dock.
